# GitHub metadata

Templates and automation for this repository.

| Item | Path |
|------|------|
| CI — Jest on push/PR | [`workflows/test.yml`](workflows/test.yml) |
| Pull request template | [`pull_request_template.md`](pull_request_template.md) |
| Bug report | [`ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.yml`](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.yml) |
| Feature request | [`ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feature_request.yml`](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feature_request.yml) |
| Permission request | [`ISSUE_TEMPLATE/permission_request.yml`](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/permission_request.yml) |
